title: Japan approves scrapping a ban on lethal weapons exports
description: The approval clears a final set of hurdles for Japan's postwar arms sales and facilitate its future sale of weapons such as a next-generation fighter jet and combat drones.

title: Here are the results for Virginia's 2026 redistricting ballot measure
description: Live election results: Get the latest on Virginia's special election on redistricting.

title: London Braces for Disruption From Tube Drivers’ Strike
description: The dispute over working conditions and hours is expected to cause widespread delays, stopping service on two lines.

title: Knicks’ Mitchell Robinson makes impact on both ends as Hawks don’t employ fouling tactics
description: There were no instances of hack-a-Robinson on Monday night. The Knicks center’s presence was felt without that ploy to get him out of the game in the 107-106 loss to the Hawks in Game 2. Mitchell Robinson was terrific at both ends of the floor, notching 13 points, seven rebounds, a steal and a block...

title: Researcher blows lid on series of strange rock corridors in Turkey, deepening Noah’s Ark mystery
description: "It's exactly the link given to the Bible. It's 300 Egyptian cubits. For us, these are all positive lines that we're pursuing, and it's showing that there's more to be found."

title: D4vd charged with murder in death of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez
description: D4vd, whose real name is David Burke, is charged with first-degree murder with special circumstances, lewd and lascivious acts with an individual under 14 and mutilating a body.

title: House GOP touts record fundraising haul in first three months of 2026
description: The National Republican Congressional Committee, House Republicans' campaign arm, is touting a record-breaking fundraising haul to start the 2026 midterm cycle, the committee chairman told CBS News.

title: Heroes, zeros from Knicks’ Game 2 loss to Hawks: Mikal Bridges’ passive last shot ends tough night
description: Heroes and zeros from the Knicks' 107-106 Game 2 loss to the Hawks on Monday night.

title: Wings HC Puts WNBA on Notice After Paige Bueckers’ Offseason Transformation
description: Wings star Paige Bueckers added some muscle this offseason, which HC Jose Fernandez thinks is bad news for the rest of the WNBA.

title: ‘Ban Steve Cohen’: Knicks Fans Outraged After Mets Owner ‘Curses’ Team
description: New York Knicks and New Yorks Mets fans can agree on one thing: Mets owner Steve Cohen might be a sports jinx.

title: Mike Brown’s odd decision helped spark phantom Knicks timeout drama after broadcast error
description: It was a timeout that had Knicks fans furious that they didn’t use in the closing seconds of the game.

title: Karl-Anthony Towns turned into nonfacter when Knicks needed him most
description: They weren’t really slowing him down the first three quarters Monday, either.

title: Sacked civil servant to speak out in Mandelson vetting row
description: Sir Olly Robbins is expected to defend his decision not to tell Sir Keir Starmer that Lord Mandelson failed vetting.

title: The Papers: 'Starmer on collision course' and 'I didn't know I was fibbing'
description: All of today's papers respond to Starmer's claims he didn't know of Lord Mandelson's failed vetting for the role of British ambassador to the US.

title: Plane incidents including bomb threats cause concern

title: Amnesty International slams ‘predatory world order’ led by US and Israel
description: Amnesty’s Secretary General says the US, Israel and Russia have waged war on civilians with impunity.

title: Japan lifts ban on lethal weapons exports in major shift of pacifist policy
description: Japan could soon sell weapons overseas, including fighter jets, in a shift from its decades-old pacifist policy.

title: Hawks’ CJ McCollum revelling in the boos as Garden’s latest villian
description: Monday night, the veteran guard heard plenty of them as he shot the Hawks past the Knicks 107-106 at the Garden to even this best-of-seven opening-round series at one game apiece.

title: Violent teen mob beats Temple University student in dorm in vicious caught-on-video attack
description: Police released surveillance images showing at least nine male teenagers believed to have been involved in the assault, some wearing hoodies and facial coverings, while others' faces were visible.

title: Knicks’ inexplicable Game 2 meltdown falls on three people — and not Mikal Bridges
description: The problem, as it unfolded in front of a stunned Garden crowd, is that it should’ve never come down to that Bridges shot at the buzzer.
